urgency_examples.quote: To jo abhi do char options available hai na colleges ke sir wo bhi close ho jayenge thode time mein.
urgency_examples.translation: The good options available now will also close in some time.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the importance of applying soon to avoid missing out on good options.

urgency_examples.quote: Aapko pata hai na agar kisi bhi college mein admission lete hai aap itne padhe likhe to ho ki aapko pata hi hoga ki kisi bhi college mein admission ke liye humko sabse pehle application form ke through jaana hota hai.
urgency_examples.translation: You know that if you take admission in any college, you should know that we have to go through the application form first.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor created a sense of urgency by stating the need to apply immediately.

urgency_examples.quote: last date is somewhere around 25th of April.
urgency_examples.translation: The last date is around 25th of April.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor informed about application deadlines to create urgency.

urgency_examples.quote: Kam se kam do teen to application form fill up karoge tabhi to kyunki abhi C S E ke liye agar top branches ke liye aap dekh rahe ho to waise bhi eighty percent seats almost colleges me reserve ho chuki hai.
urgency_examples.translation: At least you need to fill up two to three application forms because for top branches in CSE, eighty percent seats are already reserved.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor emphasized the need to apply soon due to limited seats.

urgency_examples.quote: the last date is 25th of April, like day after tomorrow.
urgency_examples.translation: The last date is 25th of April, which is day after tomorrow.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the approaching deadline for the entrance exam application.

urgency_examples.quote: To abhi abhi aapke paas eight days more hai apply karne ke liye.
urgency_examples.translation: So you have eight days more to apply.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor created a sense of urgency by mentioning application deadlines.

urgency_examples.quote: Counsellor: agar option de raha hai na koi bhi college ki aap apply kar sakte ho to main aapko yahi suggest karungi ki apply kar lena nahi to fir aapka ek year one year waste ho jayega.
urgency_examples.translation: Counsellor: If any college is giving you an option to apply, I would suggest you apply, otherwise, you will waste a year.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor emphasized the importance of applying soon to avoid wasting a year.

urgency_examples.quote: To aap inme se na shortlist karke aur ab jaise colleges ke liye aap apply karna shuru kar sakte hai.
urgency_examples.translation: You should start applying for colleges as admissions have already begun.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the importance of applying soon as admissions were starting.

urgency_examples.quote: LPU ka to kal parso last date hai.
urgency_examples.translation: The last date for LPU is the day after tomorrow.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor created urgency by mentioning application deadlines.

urgency_examples.quote: Kyunki achha college hai to seat bhi jaldi full ho jati hai na.
urgency_examples.translation: Because it's a good college, the seats fill up quickly.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor emphasized the need to apply quickly to avoid missing out on seats.

urgency_examples.quote: Delay mat karo na application mein, phir aap ek college ka to aap application karo na ma'am.
urgency_examples.translation: Don't delay in the application, then you should apply to at least one college.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor created urgency for the application process.

urgency_examples.quote: M Pharma ki seats na sabse, sabse jaldi full ho jaati hain colleges mein.
urgency_examples.translation: M Pharma seats fill up very quickly in colleges.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the importance of applying quickly due to limited seats.

urgency_examples.quote: Kyunki achha college hai to seats bhi jaldi full ho jati hai na.
urgency_examples.translation: Because it is a good college, the seats fill up quickly.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor emphasized the need to apply quickly due to limited seats.

urgency_examples.quote: agar abhi apply karte ho aaj ya kal pe to 30,000 aapko fee me bhi relaxation mil jayega.
urgency_examples.translation: If you apply today or tomorrow, you will get a relaxation of 30,000 in the fee.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor created urgency by mentioning early bird scholarship and the need to apply quickly.

urgency_examples.quote: To aap, aap na apna application apply kar sakte ho colleges ke liye.
urgency_examples.translation: So you can apply your application for the colleges.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the importance of applying early to avoid missing out on seats.

urgency_examples.quote: Kyunki maybe private colleges hote hain na wo first come first serve basis pe admission dete hain.
urgency_examples.translation: Private colleges admit on a first-come-first-serve basis.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor created a sense of urgency regarding college applications due to first-come-first-serve admissions.

urgency_examples.quote: Kyunki baad mein to aap bhi jante ho result ke time pe scholarship jo hoti hai bahut kam kar di jati hai.
urgency_examples.translation: Because later, you know that the scholarships are significantly reduced at the time of results.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor created a sense of urgency regarding the application process to secure a scholarship.

urgency_examples.quote: Sir it is that that I have very you know short time left because every college's applications are you know closing by last by 25th April or by end of the April.
urgency_examples.translation: Sir it is that that I have very you know short time left because every college's applications are you know closing by last by 25th April or by end of the April.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the importance of applying soon due to approaching deadlines.

urgency_examples.quote: I guess you should start applying because it is last time because usually colleges in my time it is a shortlisting process will be going on.
urgency_examples.translation: You should start applying because it is the last time for the shortlisting process.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the need to start applying soon due to the shortlisting process.

urgency_examples.quote: maximum colleges are closing their application soon.
urgency_examples.translation: Maximum colleges are closing their application soon.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the need to apply quickly due to closing applications.

urgency_examples.quote: Ye kabhi bhi close ho sakte hain form.
urgency_examples.translation: These forms can close at any time.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor created urgency for filling out the application forms.

urgency_examples.quote: Abhi for the timing application jo hai uske waived off hain.
urgency_examples.translation: Currently, the application fees are waived off.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor mentioned that some campuses have waived off application fees to encourage quick applications.

urgency_examples.quote: Aapko apply karna padega jaldi se.
urgency_examples.translation: You need to apply as soon as possible.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the need to apply as soon as possible after JEE results.

urgency_examples.quote: Kyunki 30th of April tak jitne acche placement wise colleges hain, unke applications close ho jayenge.
urgency_examples.translation: Because by the 30th of April, applications for good placement-wise colleges will close.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the importance of applying before deadlines.

urgency_examples.quote: Form to kaafi delay ho chuka hai, late ho gaya aapka.
urgency_examples.translation: The form has been delayed a lot, you are late.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the urgency of filling out forms due to approaching deadlines.

urgency_examples.quote: Kyunki aap turant fir check kar lete kyunki bahut saare colleges main aapko bataungi chaar paanch aapke Delhi ke top colleges bataungi.
urgency_examples.translation: Because you should check quickly as I will tell you about four or five top colleges in Delhi.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor emphasized the importance of acting quickly to secure admission.

urgency_examples.quote: Beta evening tak to possible nahi hai na kyunki meri timing jo hai wo aapki 4 baje tak ki hi timing hai.
urgency_examples.translation: It won't be possible by evening because my timing is only until 4 PM.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasizes the importance of filling the form quickly due to time constraints.

urgency_examples.quote: Aapko kam se kam teen se chaar colleges apply karne padenge.
urgency_examples.translation: You need to apply to at least three to four colleges.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the importance of applying to multiple colleges quickly.

urgency_examples.quote: Aapka application jitni jaldi karenge na wo benefit aapko jaldi mil jayega.
urgency_examples.translation: The sooner you apply, the sooner you will benefit.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the importance of applying early to secure a seat.

urgency_examples.quote: But try karna ki as soon as possible aap use complete kar le.
urgency_examples.translation: But try to complete it as soon as possible.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor emphasized the need to complete the application as soon as possible.

urgency_examples.quote: So jitna fast aap apply karenge utne chances hain aapko colleges se calls receive hone ke, theek hai?
urgency_examples.translation: The faster you apply, the more chances you have to receive calls from colleges.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor emphasized the need to apply quickly due to high competition.

urgency_examples.quote: To do one thing, aap application fill kar lo.
urgency_examples.translation: So do one thing, fill the application.
urgency_examples.description: The counsellor encouraged the student to fill the application quickly due to favorable fee structures.

urgency_examples.quote: Wo main laga dunga to wo 1000 rupees ka unka application fees aapko 500 ka padega.
urgency_examples.translation: I will apply the coupon code, so the application fee of 1000 rupees will be reduced to 500.
urgency_examples.description: Counsellor creates urgency by mentioning the limited time for the coupon code.

urgency_analysis.key_finding: Urgency tactics correlate with +8.9pp higher application rate (18.2% vs 9.3%).
